message:
fix(core,cli,mvcc,alloc,btree,journal,types): rustfmt normalization, remove stray debug print, harden log contract tests

- Remove stray debug println! from btrfs_fallocate in ffs-core
- Replace tracing::subscriber::with_default closures with install_json_subscriber helper to fix callsite interest cache poisoning in log contract tests
- Inline one-off subscriber construction in btrfs/ext4 read-only fsync rejection tests with install_json_subscriber
- Add ubs:ignore annotations on thread handle join loops in ffs-btree bw_tree tests
- Fix misindented test in ffs-types (inode_index_in_group_first_of_next_group moved inside mod tests block)
- rustfmt: normalize long method chains and struct initializers across ffs-alloc, ffs-cli, ffs-core, ffs-journal, ffs-mvcc, ffs-types

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
